items.friendly: Improve visibility of Saved Search names
items.summary: WBA - Improve Visibility of Saved Search Names
items.why: Long Saved Search names are currently truncated with no way to see the full name. A tooltip makes them readable and prevents users from picking the wrong one.

items.friendly: Standardize export behavior (sales/success request)
items.summary: Standardize Export Behavior
items.why: Sales/Success-raised: exports today don't match what users see on screen (wrong column names, order, or hidden columns included). Inconsistency creates trust issues and support tickets.

items.friendly: Link Agency records when pushing to HubSpot
items.summary: [WBA] - Implement Agency Record Linking for HubSpot Push
items.why: Mirrors what we built for Salesforce. Lets HubSpot customers correctly associate GovSpend pushes to existing Company records, protecting data integrity in their CRM.

items.friendly: Show 'Similar Bids' on the Bid Details page
items.summary: WBA - Display Similar Bids on Bid Details Page
items.why: Surfaces semantically related bids inside Bid Details so internal users can find adjacent opportunities without leaving the record. Key building block for our AI-driven discovery story.

items.friendly: Normalize Salesforce CRM IDs to the 15-character format
items.summary: Normalize Salesforce CRM IDs to 15-character format
items.why: Prevents duplicate organizations when Salesforce sends 18-character vs 15-character CRM IDs. Protects data integrity in trials, org creation, and CRM-driven flows.

items.friendly: Restore 'Add to CRM' functionality
items.summary: WBA - Loss of "Add to CRM" Functionality
items.why: Restores a CRM push action that was lost. Without it customers can't move records to their CRM directly from the platform.

items.friendly: Investigate the 'humanScore' user-engagement signal
items.summary: Investigate the humanScore user value
items.why: Several customers have complained about constant reCAPTCHA prompts, which damages perceived quality of the product. We need to understand the root cause before we can fix it.

items.friendly: Fix filter list / checkboxes shifting on selection
items.summary: Filter List/Checkboxes Shift on Selection
items.why: Filters reorder/jump under the cursor while users are selecting. A frustrating, customer-reported bug that breaks the multi-select flow.

items.friendly: Link Meeting discussions inside Bid Details
items.summary: Link Meeting Discussions within Bid Details Page
items.why: Connects meeting transcripts to the bid records they relate to, giving customers deeper context on agency needs before they engage.

items.friendly: Fix inconsistent keyword highlighting
items.summary: Inconsistent Highlighting
items.why: Search terms aren't highlighted in some prod cases. A customer-noticed bug that undermines the perceived accuracy of our search and AI products.

items.friendly: Persist the user's expanded keyword view
items.summary: Persist Expanded Keyword View
items.why: Users actively reference keywords while applying filters. Today the list collapses on every interaction, forcing repeated clicks.

items.friendly: Connect a saved search directly from the Agency Search module
items.summary: MAI - Enable Connected saved search from Agency Search Module
items.why: Unlocks a major workflow: customers can define a 'territory' once in Agency Search and reuse it as a connected filter across Bids, Spending, Meetings, and more.

items.friendly: Schedule trial-invite emails based on trial start date
items.summary: Add Ability to Schedule Trial Invite Emails Based on Trial Start Date
items.why: Users get invites before their trial starts, log in to a limited experience, and lose confidence. Aligning send time with trial start avoids that bad first impression.

items.friendly: Let users expand the AI side panel on Bids & Meetings
items.summary: Allow users to expand the AI side panel on bids and meetings
items.why: Customers say long AI responses are hard to read in the narrow side panel. An expand toggle dramatically improves readability of the AI output customers are paying for.

items.friendly: Tasks: improved counts and layout
items.summary: [WBA] Update UI/UX for Tasks
items.why: Polish for the Tasks view. Fixes count display in the header panel and prevents long descriptions from hiding the task table beneath them.

items.friendly: Export Bid Overviews to PDF
items.summary: Export Bid Overviews to PDF
items.why: Lets customers download a clean PDF of a bid and its AI overview to share with their team or clients. A key share-out moment that builds champions inside customer orgs.

items.friendly: Bulk-select saved searches across Dashboard tabs
items.summary: WBA - Bulk Search Selection for Dashboard Tabs
items.why: Account managers building dashboards add searches one at a time today. Bulk selection turns a 20-click chore into a single action.

items.friendly: Suggest keywords during Agency search
items.summary: WBA - Keyword Suggestions for Agency Search
items.why: Predictive type-ahead while searching for agencies. A fast way to reach the right record without typing the full name.

items.friendly: Multi-file support for the Iris integration
items.summary: WBA - Multi-File Support for Iris Integration
items.why: Today every attachment in a bid creates a separate Iris project, cluttering customer accounts. Bundling them into one Multi-File Project Folder keeps Iris tidy and matches how customers think about a bid.

items.friendly: Let users regenerate their account verification link
items.summary: Allow users to generate a new verification link
items.why: Today users have to contact Support or their RM for a new verification link. Self-service speeds onboarding and reduces support load.

items.friendly: Improve the search results pagination experience
items.summary: Search Results pagination experience
items.why: Customer-raised issue (Government Scientific Source): users land at the bottom of the next page instead of the top, breaking flow when reviewing results.

items.friendly: Show monthly & bulk export limits on the org subscription tab
items.summary: Display monthly exports and bulk exports on the subscription tab of org detail page
items.why: RM-requested. Gives RMs and customers visibility into export usage versus entitlement directly on the org detail page.

items.friendly: Guard-rails preventing internal users from joining customer orgs
items.summary: Create rail-guards to prevent internal users from subscribing themselves or others to external orgs
items.why: Closes a security/data-integrity gap — internal users can accidentally subscribe themselves (or others) to external orgs' searches, creating support tickets and trust issues.

items.friendly: Meeting Intelligence AI: 'Summarize meeting based on my keywords' prompt
items.summary: GAI - Add prompt to Meeting Intelligence AI Drawer: Summarize meeting based on my keywords
items.why: One-click summary tied to a user's own keywords speeds time-to-insight in Meeting Intelligence and reinforces the value of the AI module.

items.friendly: Show month names (not numbers) for Agency Fiscal Year fields
items.summary: MAI - Update the Agency Fiscal Year Start/end Month fields to show actual month values and not numbers
items.why: Today users see '10' instead of 'October'. A small UX polish that makes Agency fiscal year fields immediately understandable.

items.friendly: Enable export from Lists
items.summary: Enable Export Functionality for Lists
items.why: Customers and internal teams need Lists data outside the product (pipeline reviews, sharing). This unblocks that workflow.

items.friendly: Standardize export behavior across all modules
items.summary: Standardize and Streamline Export Functionality Across Modules
items.why: Customers complain that exports look different from what's on screen. Standardizing builds trust and removes a recurring support issue.

items.friendly: Auto-deactivate SSO users when removed from customer AD group
items.summary: Auto Decommission SSO Users Removed from Customer AD group
items.why: Customers must manually deactivate users removed from their AD today. Automating reduces admin burden, security risk, and license waste.

items.friendly: Central tag-management view
items.summary: Centralized View and Management for Tags
items.why: Users have asked us to bring back a single place to view and manage tags. Improves transparency and saves the back-and-forth of hunting tags across the product.

items.friendly: Expand Lists to support Contacts, Meetings, and Federal data
items.summary: Expand Lists to Include Contact, Meeting and Federal Data
items.why: Today Lists are missing contact details and major data types (Meetings, Federal). Limits how customers can use Lists for outreach and pipeline tracking.

items.friendly: In-product nudge so trial users can find Saved Searches
items.summary: Add Banner or In-Product Message to Help Trial Users Locate Saved Searches
items.why: Trial users struggle to find Saved Searches, which hurts engagement during the trial window. A targeted in-product message improves conversion.

items.friendly: Saved Searches: bulk tagging and folder organization
items.summary: Enhance Saved Searches with Bulk Tagging and Folder Organization Capabilities
items.why: Customers managing 20+ Saved Searches tag users one at a time today. Bulk tagging and folders save hours of admin and improve adoption.

items.friendly: Sort the Agency 'State' filter alphabetically
items.summary: Add Alphabetical Sorting Option for Agency State Filter
items.why: Quick UX win. Today the filter is sorted by PO count, but users often know the state they want and need alphabetical order to find it fast.

items.friendly: AI Notebook: prompt user to save search criteria
items.summary: Prompt Users to Save Search Criteria When Creating or Updating AI Notebook Projects
items.why: Lets users keep the criteria behind their AI Notebook project so they can later set alerts, push to CRM, or do follow-up analysis. Closes a workflow gap.

items.friendly: AI Panel: support reading file types beyond PDF
items.summary: Expand AI Panel File Reading Support Beyond PDFs
items.why: Customers regularly need to feed Excel, ZIP, and other formats into the AI panel. Limiting it to PDF caps the value of the AI module in their day-to-day.

items.friendly: Contact upload, matching, and AI outreach workflow
items.summary: Contact Upload, Matching, and AI Outreach Workflow
items.why: Shifts the customer experience from raw data delivery to a guided 'who to call and what to say' workflow. A meaningful differentiator for sales-driven customers.

items.friendly: Add aggregated spend fields to the Agencies dataset (CRM)
items.summary: Add Aggregated Spend Fields to Agencies Dataset for CRM Integration
items.why: Customers integrating to CRM want summary spend per agency, not just transactions. Adding these fields unlocks the integration's value for executive reporting.

items.friendly: Show Fiscal Year Start Date on the new Agency landing page
items.summary: Add Fiscal Year Start Date to New Agency Landing Page
items.why: Analysts need fiscal year context to interpret spend patterns. Keeping this field on the new Agency landing page preserves accuracy.

items.friendly: Include detail links in Federal Spending exports
items.summary: [WBA] [Follow-Up] - Include Detail Links in Federal Exports
items.why: Follow-up to an existing customer-driven change — federal exports currently lack the deep-link URLs customers use to jump back into the platform.

items.friendly: Save user sort preferences in Lists
items.summary: Save Sort Preferences in Lists
items.why: Users currently re-sort Lists every time they log in. Persisting the preference is a small change with daily value.

items.friendly: Meeting Intelligence: proximity search ('within X seconds')
items.summary: Proximity Search ("Within" X Seconds) for Meeting Intelligence
items.why: Heavily requested capability mirroring Clover AI. Lets users find moments where two terms are discussed together (e.g., 'drone' near 'police') instead of all meetings that just mention both.

items.friendly: Categorize Bids & RFPs by sales stage
items.summary: Categorize Bids & RFPs by Stage
items.why: Most competitors offer Pre-RFP / RFP / Awarded stages. Without this, customers can't prioritize outreach by where a deal sits in the procurement lifecycle.

items.friendly: Add 'Contract URL' to default columns
items.summary: Add "Contract URL" to Default Columns
items.why: Customers add this column every session today. Defaulting it on (and persisting) saves clicks and matches the most common use case.

items.friendly: Default the Heat Map to 'PO Issued Date'
items.summary: Set "PO Issued Date" as Default for Heat Map
items.why: The most relevant date type for spending analysis. Making it the default removes a step before users see meaningful data.

items.friendly: Notify users when an export is ready
items.summary: Add Notification Upon Exporting
items.why: Users currently click Export and don't know where their file went. A clear notification points them to the Exports tab and prevents repeated support tickets.

items.friendly: Show help options on empty search results
items.summary: Add Help Options to Empty Search Results
items.why: Today zero-result searches in Contracts > Agency leave users assuming the data doesn't exist. A guided next step (contact Support / RM) keeps them engaged.

items.friendly: Require details on the 'Invite User' form
items.summary: Require Details on "Invite User" Form
items.why: Today admins can invite users without First Name, Last Name, or Years of Experience. Leads to incomplete profiles and inaccurate usage reporting.

items.friendly: Add 'Bid Number' as a default column
items.summary: Add "Bid Number" as Default Column
items.why: Customers reference bid records by number every day. Defaulting it on the grid removes friction from a daily workflow.

items.friendly: Add 'PO Number' as a default column
items.summary: Add "PO Number" as Default Column
items.why: Customers reference POs by number every day. Defaulting it on the grid removes friction from a daily workflow.

items.friendly: Add Agency Fiscal Year fields to Agency & Spending modules
items.summary: Add "Agency Fiscal Year" Fields to Agency & Spending Modules
items.why: Surfaces fiscal year as a column and filter in Agency and Spending. Lets users align spend with the correct reporting cycle without clicking into each profile.

items.friendly: AI Notebook: enable by default for all premium users
items.summary: [AI Notebook] Enable Access by Default for All Premium Users
items.why: AI Notebook is now stable enough to ship to all Premium users. Flipping the default expands AI adoption across our highest-revenue segment.

items.friendly: Add Agency ID to default PO Contacts export
items.summary: Add Agency ID to Default PO Contacts Export
items.why: Without Agency ID in the export, customers can't reliably map PO contacts back to the right agency in their CRM or outreach systems.

items.friendly: Modernize the Saved Search alert-email design
items.summary: Update Saved Search Alert Emails to use Opportunity Alert Email Design & Format
items.why: Brings Saved Search alert emails in line with the modern Opportunity alert design. Improves engagement with one of the most common touchpoints customers have with the product.

items.friendly: Engineering: 'Similar Bids' retrieval logic
items.summary: [WBA] [ENG] - Similar Bids Retrieval Logic
items.why: Backend foundation for the Similar Bids feature on Bid Details. Required before customers see the user-facing experience.

items.friendly: Show matching keywords in saved-search alert emails (R&D bids)
items.summary: Add Keyword Info to Alert Emails: R&D
items.why: Lets customers see which alerts matter most at a glance, instead of clicking through to figure out which keywords triggered each alert.

items.friendly: Add a population column to Agency Stats in Spending
items.summary: Add Population Count as a column on the Agency Stats tab in Spending
items.why: Reps use population data to qualify deals; exposing it as a sortable column saves clicks and helps target the right opportunities.

items.friendly: Refresh the GovSpend invitation email design & content
items.summary: Updates to GovSpend Invitation Email
items.why: First impression for every new user. Modernizing the subject, copy, and visuals improves welcome experience and onboarding engagement.

items.friendly: CRM: visual indicator on records already pushed to CRM
items.summary: CRM - Add visual indication for records that have been integrated
items.why: Customers have asked repeatedly to know at a glance which records are already in their CRM, so they don't waste time double-pushing the same record.
